Solana 48-Hour Brief 🟣 📰 

Here’s what happened on Solana in the last 48H 👇

Infrastructure & Core Protocol

- @solana introduces Jito’s ACE (Bam) as a next-gen execution layer improving liquidity, transaction flow, and user-first processing.

- @solana adds support for Machine Payments Protocol (@mpp) by @stripe and @tempo, enabling APIs to accept stablecoins with native fee abstraction.

- @lightprotocol launches Light Token SDK on mainnet, reducing token account costs to ~$0.001 with seamless SPL compatibility.

RWAs & Institutional

- Franklin Templeton ETFs go live on Solana via @OndoFinance Global Markets.

- Solana RWA holders reach a new ATH of 173K.

- Solana Foundation launches enterprise platform with partners including Mastercard, Worldpay, and Western Union.

Ecosystem & Events

- @colosseum opens registrations for the Solana Frontier Hackathon (April 6 – May 11).

Cross-Chain & Liquidity

- @mayan surpasses $5.5B in volume bridged to Solana and launches Mayan 2.0 for instant cross-chain transfers.

Developer Tools & Products

- @chambaz launches wui, an open-source terminal wallet for trading, staking, and transfers on Solana.

Launches on @solana

The week in review

> @solanamobile rolls out Builder Grants - funding the next wave of mobile-first dApps

> @GustoHQ integrates USDC payouts - enabling same-day cross-border payments for global contractors

> @sanafionchain unveils Sana Card - a self-custody Visa card powered by @raincards for real-world spending

> @tokens goes live - a 24/7 news layer tracking how global markets move and where they settle on Solana

> @travalacom expands into Solana - now supporting car rental bookings via crypto payments

> @solana_devs kicks off Japan Bootcamp - onboarding the next generation of builders in Asia

> @MessariCrypto adds x402 support - enabling USDC-based payments across its API endpoints on Solana

> @altitude unlocks bank transfers - seamless direct fiat rails connecting users to global payments

> @Alchemy enables agent payments - Solana agents can now pay for APIs using USDC via @x402

> @kamino pilots Atlas with @Anchorage - bringing institutional-grade collateral management into credit markets

> @DeriveXYZ launches SOL options - expanding derivatives access within the ecosystem

> @Paradex’s DIME debuts via @Sunrise_DeFi - introducing new structured products on Solana

> @yield rolls out yoSOL vault - algorithmically optimized yield strategies go live

> @hinkal_protocol drops privacy wallet - unlocking confidential transactions on Solana

> @ScorelyGG launches leveraged betting - a sports betting platform offering up to 10x odds exposure

> @PlayBabylon unveils prediction arena - humans vs AI agents in a multiplayer forecasting game

> @bigdance_fun introduces tokenized brackets - onchain game tied to live tournament outcomes

> @fairscalexyz ships reputation layer - Chrome extension displaying wallet-level trust scores

> @glamsystems launches Token ACL - enabling compliance without sacrificing composability

> @CyreneAI opens Genesis Accelerator - offering Solana builders up to $100K in seed funding

Solana Onchain Agents Ecosystem 🌟

🔸Core Agent Stack: @OpenClaw, @x402, @elizaOS 

🔸Infrastructure: @swarms_corp , @VeryAI, @SecretNetwork , @saidinfra, @PlaiPinHQ, @RealmsDAO, @CoralOS_ai, @n8n_io

Comment below and we’ll add them in the next update.👇

🔔 What is SolSlay ?

🎮 SolSlay is a free-to-play, competitive, real-time gaming platform on solana where players can compete in live games and earn rewards through gameplay 🎁

🤔 Is SolSlay free to play ?
✅ Yes.
🎮 SolSlay is free-to-play platform

🤔 Is SolSlay Play-to-Earn? 
✅ Yes
🎁 SolSlay rewards active players in multiples ways:

⚔️ Ranking on Boss Battle by dealing damage and climbing the leaderboard 
📜 Completing Quests ( Daily and one-time missions )
🎯 Winning rounds in $SOL Jackpot and #SLY Jackpot 
🎁 Claiming the Faucet / Airdrop ( Limited-Time )

☀️ SolSlay currency supports:
#SOL
- Solana native token 
- Earned through Boss Battle, quests and special events

#SLY
- SolSlay platform token built on the Solana Blockchain 
- Earned through Boss battle, Faucet/Airdrop, quests and referrals 

🤔 How to connect to SolSlay ? 
1. Open SolSlay
2. Connect your Solana wallet 
3. Verify wallet ownership ( sign a message )
🚫 This is not a transaction
🚫 It does not move funds
✅ It securely confirms that you own the wallet

🎮 Games on SolSlay 

1) Boss Battle ( PvE ) 
⚔️ Boss Battle is a real-time boss event where players attacks together and compete for ranked rewards 

🤔 How it works ? 
- You attack the boss using  energy
- Energy cost: 1 energy per attack
- Energy regen +1 every 2 minutes
- You climb the leaderboard by dealing damage

🎁 Rewards ( Performance-Based )
- Rewards are distributed based on your final rank 
- Bosses rarity tiers ( Common -> Mythic ), with higher tiers offering bigger rewards. 

2) SOL Jackpot ( Solana Jackpot ) 
🏆 Players enter with $SOL ( Solana ) and one winner takes the entire pot.

🤔 How it works ?
- The round begins once 2+ players join.
- The rounds runs for 90 seconds 
- Each player chance is weighted by their contribution on the pot
- At the end of the timer, a winner is selected and the entire pot is awarded 

3) SLY Jackpot 
🎯 The same winner take all format, but played with SLY

🤔 How it works ?
- Players enter with $SLY
- The round begins once 2+ players join.
- The rounds runs for 90 seconds 
- Each player chance is weighted by their contribution on the pot
- At the end of the timer, a winner is selected and the entire pot is awarded

🤔 Can I withdraw SOL or SLY ?
✅ Yes
↘️ You can withdraw SOL or SLY directly to your connected wallet. 

🤔 Can I swap SOL to SLY or SLY to SOL ? 
⏳ The swap system will be available soon. 
💱 Users will be able to swap $SOL to $SLY and $SLY to $SOL directly on the SolSlay platform.

🎮 SolSlay is built to be simple to start, competitive to master and rewarding for active players. 🎁

✅ https://t.co/R7hY7Z0Z0C

missed the launch on captcha-sol. didn't matter.

first position: 1 hour 2 minutes, $120. second position: 4 hours 27 minutes, $42. same token, same simple bid-ask, just let the chart dump into my range both times.

this is the thing people miss when they tilt over missing a launch. the play doesn't end when the token peaks. if the chart still shows a bounce after every dump, the token is still alive and there's still fees to collect.

after closing the first position i looked at the chart again. structure was still decent, still bouncing, volume hadn't completely died. so i re-entered with the same setup. let it dump on me again, let the range fill, closed on the next bounce.

$162 total from a token i didn't even catch on launch.

you don't need to be early every time. you just need to read whether the token still has legs after the initial move. if it does, the bid-ask range will do the work for you. if it doesn't, you close early and move on.

agent dlmm gua atau meridian ngga sempurna. ada loss day, dan jujur sebenernya itu salah gua.

posisi lagi OOR ke kiri, agent sebenernya bisa cut loss sendiri. tapi gua matiin agent-nya, gua hold manual, dan ternyata makin dalem. bukan agent yang salah, gua yang interfere.

total 16 hari berjalan udah dapet sekitar 4.11 sol ($342) dengan cost 10$ buat api open router, 5$ vps.

gua tiap pagi tinggal cek morning brief, cek lessons, cek market, kasi insight.

tapi overall hasilnya oke buat sebulan. cukup buat nutup Claude 3 bulan ke depan, Minimax setahun, VPS setahun, dan masih sisa.

gua sekarang lagi ngembangin agent buat ngetrench, lebih fokus ke cari narasi di X dan track smart wallet.

hal yang gua siapin adalah okx agent kit, jup cli, dan gmgn api.

sebenernya gini mas, bikin agent itu gampang. tapi gua heran deh kenapa orang coding di openclaw.

selama ini gua pake codex atau claude cli.

dengan 10$ subscription gua udah bisa:

- bikin beberapa website
- built agent yang hasilin 20-100$ sehari
- bikin tools buat trenching/dlmm
- bikin sistem pantau kebakaran hutan (in progress)

yang penting lu harus bisa ngarahin data yang mau lu ambil dari mana.

misal :

- tolong bikinin gua agent dlmm meteora otomatis. dia bakal bingung.

contoh benar :

- gua mau bikin agent dlmm meteora. flownya udah gua siapin kaya gini, lu bisa ambil data dari api ini buat nyari pool, ambil data dari api ini buat cek holder.

dia bakal langsung terarah, jadi lu ngga harus bisa ngoding, lu harus paham flow agent lu mau gimana.

dataset.

lu bisa punya LLM terbaik, agent loop yang paling clean, tooling yang paling canggih. tanpa dataset yang bener, agent lu ga bisa ngapa-ngapain yang berguna.

LLM belum bisa baca web secara native kayak manusia. tapi mereka baca markdown files dan JSON dengan sangat baik. di situlah dataset lu harus hidup. terstruktur, bersih, dan bisa diproses sama model.

kalau lu mau agent lu ngerti tentang suatu platform atau protokol, cek dulu docs-nya. terus cek apakah mereka nyediain API reference. kalau ada, itu sumber data lu. feed ke agent lu dalam format yang bisa dia proses.

sampleTweets.text:
Projects to Watch This Week on @Solana

Solana is shipping across DeFi, payments, trading, and infra. Which one are you watching. 

1. @Sunrise_DeFi - Half a billion in 30-day volume across listed assets. Every listing is a bet on Solana liquidity and the numbers show it’s working.

2. @PlayBabylon - 490K trades, 1,171 agents, 16K+ live prediction markets in 5 days. Volume tripled over the weekend. Agents are already building onchain reputation.

3. @BagsApp - Stocks are live. Launch a company onchain, register instantly, and allocate up to 30% equity to holders. Real ownership and IP baked in.

4. @hinkal_protocol - Hinkal Pay is live. Private payments on Solana with full cryptographic privacy. Instant, wallet agnostic, no CEX routing.

Down the next rabbit hole we go. Not sure how long this next article is going to take me, but it will be very detailed about what goes into building a competitive perpetuals dex. Many talented teams have tried and failed. You won't vibe code your way into this.

Building a Perp DEX Is Hard

"Most people who talk about perp DEXes haven't tried to build one. Myself included. Which is why I want to be very honest about it. The conversation stays at the level of market share and microstructure and which chain has better ordering. It's easy to say "someone should build a perp DEX here." It's easy to say it's an obvious opportunity, that the users are already here, that the market is just waiting to be captured. All of that is true. What's harder to say, and what almost nobody says out loud, is that actually building one requires a very specific combination of knowledge and skills that most teams don't have. Financial engineering, distributed systems, market microstructure, onchain development, risk modeling. Not adjacent to these things. Deep in them. And almost certainly a team that has done this before, or some version of it, because the failure modes aren't obvious until you've seen them."

The idea here is:

You don’t get to choose the use cases that force the underlying hardware to increase bandwidth or capabilities

But once the hardware has scaled (ISPs, phones, blockchains), many other higher order human needs are solvable

Facebook was a dating app but became a powerful news channel

PMF comes from catering to what people actually want, not what they say they want (revealed vs stated preference)

The Fed is in a tough spot. With a weak labor market they would usually cut rates and inject liquidity into risk assets, but with rising inflation driven by energy and oil prices, the Fed is stuck.
